channel.title: mac on Jihan
channel.description: Recent content in mac on Jihan

item.title: 那些我重装Windows/MacOS/Ubuntu时会做的事情
item.description: Windows 跳过联网激活使用本地账号 在连接网络的界面按住Shift+F10调出CMD输入OOBE\BYPASSNRO 安装软件 # Needed to run a remote script the first time Set-ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope CurrentUser # set scoop dir is C:\Scoop md C:\Scoop irm get.scoop.sh -outfile 'install.ps1' .\install.ps1 -ScoopDir 'C:\Scoop' -ScoopGlobalDir 'C:\Scoop' -NoProxy scoop install sudo git neovim scoop bucket add extras scoop install obsidian wechat potplayer trafficmonitor snipaste screentogif powertoys wezterm scoop bucket add nerd-fontasdfs sudo scoop install -g FiraCode-NF-Mono JetBrainsMono-NF-Mono scoop bucket add java scoop install gcc make cmake rust python go openjdk scoop bucket add im-select https://github.
